title: Sweet & Chewy Garlic Flatbread
description: A sweet and chewy garlic flatbread that's perfect for a breakfast snack or dessert. This vegan-friendly dish features air-frying to enhance its texture.

ingredients.name: Vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: 1 tsp for sweetness enhancement, optional but recommended

ingredients.name: Garlic granules
ingredients.amount: 2 tbsp fresh garlic finely minced and crushed into small pieces

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup cold milk to activate the gluten

instructions: Mix flour, sugar, vanilla extract, oil, garlic granules, milk, and salt in a large bowl until the dough comes together.
If the dough is too stiff, you can add more cold water to make it easier to handle. Otherwise, proceed with step 4.
Divide the dough into four equal parts and shape them into flatbread discs.
Air fry each disc for about 5-7 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside, flipping halfway through cooking.
Let cool slightly before serving. Optional: Top with a drizzle of honey or maple syrup for added sweetness.
